SubscriptionIdParameter.name: subscriptionId
SubscriptionIdParameter.description: The ID of the target subscription.

ApiVersionParameter.name: api-version
ApiVersionParameter.description: The API version to use for this operation.

ResourceGroupNameParameter.name: resourceGroupName
ResourceGroupNameParameter.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

VnetConfiguration.description: Configuration properties for apps environment to join a Virtual Network

internal.description: Boolean indicating the environment only has an internal load balancer. These environments do not have a public static IP resource. They must provide infrastructureSubnetId if enabling this property

infrastructureSubnetId.description: Resource ID of a subnet for infrastructure components. Must not overlap with any other provided IP ranges.

dockerBridgeCidr.description: CIDR notation IP range assigned to the Docker bridge, network. Must not overlap with any other provided IP ranges.

platformReservedCidr.description: IP range in CIDR notation that can be reserved for environment infrastructure IP addresses. Must not overlap with any other provided IP ranges.

platformReservedDnsIP.description: An IP address from the IP range defined by platformReservedCidr that will be reserved for the internal DNS server.

Mtls.description: Configuration properties for mutual TLS authentication

enabled.description: Boolean indicating whether the mutual TLS authentication is enabled

ManagedEnvironment.description: An environment for hosting container apps

daprAIInstrumentationKey.description: Azure Monitor instrumentation key used by Dapr to export Service to Service communication telemetry

daprAIConnectionString.description: Application Insights connection string used by Dapr to export Service to Service communication telemetry

deploymentErrors.description: Any errors that occurred during deployment or deployment validation

defaultDomain.description: Default Domain Name for the cluster

zoneRedundant.description: Whether or not this Managed Environment is zone-redundant.

eventStreamEndpoint.description: The endpoint of the eventstream of the Environment.

workloadProfiles.description: Workload profiles configured for the Managed Environment.

infrastructureResourceGroup.description: Name of the platform-managed resource group created for the Managed Environment to host infrastructure resources. If a subnet ID is provided, this resource group will be created in the same subscription as the subnet.

peerAuthentication.description: Peer authentication settings for the Managed Environment

peerTrafficConfiguration.description: Peer traffic settings for the Managed Environment

encryption.description: Peer traffic encryption settings for the Managed Environment

enabled.description: Boolean indicating whether the peer traffic encryption is enabled

nextLink.description: Link to next page of resources.

LogAnalyticsConfiguration.description: Log Analytics configuration, must only be provided when destination is configured as 'log-analytics'

properties.description: Environment auth token resource specific properties

WorkloadProfile.description: Workload profile to scope container app execution.

workloadProfileStates.description: Collection of all the workload Profile States for a Managed Environment..

nextLink.description: Link to next page of resources.

code.description: Standardized string to programmatically identify the error.

message.description: Detailed error description and debugging information.

target.description: Detailed error description and debugging information.

code.description: Standardized string to programmatically identify the error.

message.description: Detailed error description and debugging information.

target.description: Detailed error description and debugging information.

systemData.description: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

Resource.title: Resource
Resource.description: Common fields that are returned in the response for all Azure Resource Manager resources

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. E.g. "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}"

type.description: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

TrackedResource.title: Tracked Resource
TrackedResource.description: The resource model definition for an Azure Resource Manager tracked top level resource which has 'tags' and a 'location'

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

ManagedServiceIdentityType.description: Type of managed service identity (where both SystemAssigned and UserAssigned types are allowed).

principalId.description: The principal ID of the assigned identity.

clientId.description: The client ID of the assigned identity.

UserAssignedIdentities.title: User-Assigned Identities
UserAssignedIdentities.description: The set of user assigned identities associated with the resource. The userAssignedIdentities dictionary keys will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}. The dictionary values can be empty objects ({}) in requests.

ManagedServiceIdentity.description: Managed service identity (system assigned and/or user assigned identities)

principalId.description: The service principal ID of the system assigned identity. This property will only be provided for a system assigned identity.

tenantId.description: The tenant ID of the system assigned identity. This property will only be provided for a system assigned identity.

CertificateKeyVaultProperties.description: Properties for a certificate stored in a Key Vault.

identity.description: Resource ID of a managed identity to authenticate with Azure Key Vault, or System to use a system-assigned identity.

keyVaultUrl.description: URL pointing to the Azure Key Vault secret that holds the certificate.

CustomDomainConfiguration.description: Configuration properties for apps environment custom domain

customDomainVerificationId.description: Id used to verify domain name ownership

dnsSuffix.description: Dns suffix for the environment domain

WorkloadProfileName.description: Workload profile name for container apps to execute on.

WorkloadProfileType.description: Workload profile type for container apps to execute on.

Certificate.description: Certificate used for Custom Domain bindings of Container Apps in a Managed Environment

subjectAlternativeNames.description: Subject alternative names the certificate applies to.

nextLink.description: Link to next page of resources.

tags.description: Application-specific metadata in the form of key-value pairs.

ManagedCertificate.description: Managed certificates used for Custom Domain bindings of Container Apps in a Managed Environment

error.description: Any error occurred during the certificate provision.

domainControlValidation.description: Selected type of domain control validation for managed certificates.

validationToken.description: A TXT token used for DNS TXT domain control validation when issuing this type of managed certificates.

tags.description: Application-specific metadata in the form of key-value pairs.

nextLink.description: Link to next page of resources.

name.description: The name of the resource for which availability needs to be checked.

nameAvailable.description: Indicates if the resource name is available.

reason.description: The reason why the given name is not available.

message.description: Detailed reason why the given name is available.

ProxyResource.title: Proxy Resource
ProxyResource.description: The resource model definition for a Azure Resource Manager proxy resource. It will not have tags and a location
